# poweradmin_zone_template_record (Resource)

Manages a record inside a Poweradmin zone template. Template records can use the placeholders `[ZONE]`, `[NS1]`, `[NS2]`, `[HOSTMASTER]`, and `[SERIAL]`, which are substituted when a zone is created from the template. Requires Poweradmin 4.2.0+.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A zone template populated with placeholder records that get substituted
# (e.g. [ZONE], [NS1], [HOSTMASTER], [SERIAL]) when a zone is created from it.
resource "poweradmin_zone_template" "hosting" {
  name        = "default-hosting"
  description = "Default record set for hosting customers"
}

resource "poweradmin_zone_template_record" "soa" {
  template_id = poweradmin_zone_template.hosting.id
  name        = "[ZONE]"
  type        = "SOA"
  content     = "[NS1] [HOSTMASTER] [SERIAL] 28800 7200 604800 86400"
  ttl         = 86400
}

resource "poweradmin_zone_template_record" "ns1" {
  template_id = poweradmin_zone_template.hosting.id
  name        = "[ZONE]"
  type        = "NS"
  content     = "[NS1]"
  ttl         = 86400
}

resource "poweradmin_zone_template_record" "ns2" {
  template_id = poweradmin_zone_template.hosting.id
  name        = "[ZONE]"
  type        = "NS"
  content     = "[NS2]"
  ttl         = 86400
}

resource "poweradmin_zone_template_record" "mx" {
  template_id = poweradmin_zone_template.hosting.id
  name        = "[ZONE]"
  type        = "MX"
  content     = "mail.[ZONE]"
  ttl         = 3600
  priority    = 10
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `content` (String) Record content. Supports the same placeholders as `name`.
- `name` (String) Record name. Supports the `[ZONE]` placeholder.
- `template_id` (Number) ID of the zone template that owns this record. Changing this forces recreation.
- `type` (String) DNS record type (e.g. `A`, `AAAA`, `CNAME`, `MX`, `TXT`, `NS`, `SOA`).

### Optional

- `priority` (Number) Record priority (used by `MX`, `SRV`). Defaults to `0`.
- `ttl` (Number) Record TTL in seconds. Defaults to `86400`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier in the format `template_id/record_id`
- `record_id` (Number) Numeric record ID assigned by Poweradmin

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import a template record by its composite identifier: template_id/record_id
terraform import poweradmin_zone_template_record.soa 1/10
```
